title: Tantu Panggelaran: How Java Was Made Flat
description: The gods move Mount Meru from India to Java, flattening the island in the process — the Javanese creation myth.
introduction: The gods move Mount Meru from India to Java, flattening the island in the process — the Javanese creation myth.

translation.text: The gods carried Mount Meru from Jambudvipa to Java. When they set it down, the island was pressed flat.
